results.title: Search Tour

bugs.title: Date range picker for tour search is not interactive
bugs.description: During the 'Search Tour' automated test, the date range picker element for selecting starting dates was not interactive. The navigator agent was unable to select dates from a calendar interface and instead had to directly type a date into the input field.
bugs.expected: Users should be able to interact with a date range picker to select a starting date for tour searches.
bugs.actual: The date range picker was not interactive, and the date had to be manually typed into the input field.

results.agentOutput: A bug has been recorded with ID 'BUG-1770868001219' regarding the non-interactive date range picker for tour searches.

results.title: Search Car Rental
results.agentOutput: The automated test "Search Car Rental" on guidetoiceland.is passed successfully. The car rental search was executed, navigating to the homepage, clicking on the 'Cars' tab, selecting a starting date, and clicking the 'Search Now' button.
